issue.message: Overriding method should call `super.onBackPressed`
Use of LayoutInflater.from(Context) detected. Consider using layoutInflater instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Formatting %d followed by words ("connections"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("active"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="close_app_confirm">%1$d active connections are open. Really close the app?</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("active"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Set `android:baselineAligned="false"` on this element for better performance
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/terminal_bg` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.KonsoleSSH`)

Prefer "`SHOW_AS_ACTION_IF_ROOM`" instead of "`SHOW_AS_ACTION_ALWAYS`"
Prefer "`SHOW_AS_ACTION_IF_ROOM`" instead of "`SHOW_AS_ACTION_ALWAYS`"
Missing `autofillHints` attribute
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Use the KTX extension property `View.isVisible` instead?
Use the KTX extension property `View.isVisible` instead?
Use the KTX extension property `View.isVisible` instead?
issue.errorLine1: else if (!cr && hr.visibility == View.VISIBLE) { hr.visibility = View.GONE; keybarHintAnimRight?.cancel(); hr.translationX = 0f }

issue.message: Use the KTX extension property `View.isVisible` instead?
issue.errorLine1: else if (!cl && hl.visibility == View.VISIBLE) { hl.visibility = View.GONE; keybarHintAnimLeft?.cancel(); hl.translationX = 0f }

issue.message: Use the KTX extension property `View.isVisible` instead?

issue.message: Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?

Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?
Custom view `TerminalView` overrides `onTouchEvent` but not `performClick`
Missing accessibility label: provide either a view with an `android:labelFor` that references this view or provide an `android:hint`
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
String literal in `setText` can not be translated. Use Android resources instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.
Do not concatenate text displayed with `setText`. Use resource string with placeholders.
Hardcoded string "F1", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "F2", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "F3", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "▶", should use `@string` resource

When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
